title: TFC-Exposure
description: Mod-Datapack which converts Exposure's recipes to TerraFirmaCraft compatible ones.
body:
![Mod joke-logo, reading "WHO UP EXPOSIN THEY TFC"](https://i.imgur.com/DpgrFJh.png)

This datapack (also loadable as a mod for convenience sake) converts recipes from the [Exposure](https://modrinth.com/mod/exposure) mod to be compatible and make sense with [TerraFirmaCraft's](https://modrinth.com/mod/terrafirmacraft) progression.

Every recipe uses tags where necessary to ensure maximum compatibility with TFC addons, such as [ArborFirmaCraft](https://modrinth.com/mod/arborfirmacraft-(afc)), which is fully fully supported.

Soot and Graphite powder can be interchanged in recipes involving them, and can also be used instead of black dye in the Lightroom when printing pictures.

**For the Camera Flash, you will need to define your own item to be used as a flash inside the camera. By default, the vanilla Redstone Lamp (unobtainable by default) can still be used, the Immersive Engineering light bulb can be used, and the Create Rose Quartz Lamp can be used. Without IE or Create, you will _not_ have any items which can trigger the flash.** Once I've figured out a TFC friendly replacement item, I'll update the mod/datapack with the change.

Additionally, Graphite Powder now turns into gray dye instead of blue.

![List of recipes included by this mod.](https://i.imgur.com/o60Leku.png)


<details>
<summary>New textures:</summary>

![Camera's new texture, features a brown body and a brass frame.](https://i.imgur.com/d5Vk8d4.png)
![Image of a player character holding a retextured selfie stick.](https://i.imgur.com/VOfN098.png)

</details>
